import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { Users, Activity, Calendar, DollarSign, Clock, FileText, CheckCircle, Plus } from 'lucide-react'; import { registerDoctor } from '../services/auth'; import { BarChart, Bar, XAxis, YAxis, CartesianGrid, Tooltip, ResponsiveContainer } from 'recharts'; export default function Dashboard() { const role = localStorage.getItem('role') || 'ADMIN'; const [docForm, setDocForm] = useState({username: '', password: ''}); const [msg, setMsg] = useState({text: '', type: ''}); // Mock data for charts const revenueData = [ { name: 'Mon', revenue: 4000 }, { name: 'Tue', revenue: 3000 }, { name: 'Wed', revenue: 5000 }, { name: 'Thu', revenue: 2780 }, { name: 'Fri', revenue: 6890 }, { name: 'Sat', revenue: 2390 }, { name: 'Sun', revenue: 3490 }, ]; async function handleRegisterDoctor(e){ e.preventDefault(); setMsg({text: '', type: ''}); try { await registerDoctor(docForm); setMsg({text: 'Doctor successfully registered!', type: 'success'}); setDocForm({username: '', password: ''}); } catch(err) { setMsg({text: err.response?.data || 'Failed to register doctor', type: 'error'}); } } const AdminDashboard = () => ( <>
